description: Style Notefabindia's jewellery references the eras gone by and are reworked to blend in with your season outfits. Whoever told you ethnic jewellery can't be worn with your fashion favourites were wrong! This statement piece from Fabindia is a jewellery box essential that will make an interesting addition to your simple ensembles. Having a piece like this adds an interesting dimension to a monochrome outfit or an ensemble dominated by neutral hues.Product DetailsGold plated silver flower shaped pendant with a Peridot emerald coloured centre stoneA loop for a chain to go through, chain not includedMaterial and CareSilverWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeWidth: 2.5 cm
